meta.title: A Day in the Life of a CCS Student
meta.description: Navigate the pressures of a Computer Science curriculum at AUF.

chapters.title: SEARCHING & PATTERN MATCHING
chapters.description: Master the art of finding information in large datasets.

start.text: Chapter 1: Searching & Pattern Matching. Welcome to your first module.
start.speaker: Instructor

chapters.title: SORTING
chapters.description: Organize data efficiently to optimize performance.

start.text: Chapter 2: Sorting. Time to put things in order.
start.speaker: Instructor

chapters.title: GRAPHS & NETWORKS
chapters.description: Navigate complex connections and find the shortest paths.

start.text: Chapter 3: Graphs & Networks. Mapping the digital world.
start.speaker: Instructor

chapters.title: DYNAMIC PROGRAMMING
chapters.description: Solve complex problems by breaking them into simpler subproblems.

start.text: Chapter 4: Dynamic Programming. Optimization at its finest.
start.speaker: Instructor

chapters.title: STATE-SPACE SEARCH
chapters.description: Explore all possible states to find the optimal decision path.

start.text: Chapter 5: State-Space Search. Deciding the future.
start.speaker: Instructor

algorithms.title: DIJKSTRA'S SHORTEST PATH
algorithms.definition: An iterative algorithm that finds the shortest path between nodes in a weighted graph.
algorithms.useCase: Used primarily in network routing protocols and GPS navigation to calculate the fastest route.

algorithms.useCase: Used primarily in Hash Map related tasks and system optimizations.
